title: acrostichum glabrescens
intro: Acrostichum glabrescens is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae, commonly known as the smooth-leaved leather fern. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in India and Southeast Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. Acrostichum glabrescens can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
